window_summary: This window tracks the recent conductor-oss/conductor release stream, covering stable releases v3.22.2 through v3.30.1 and a series of pre-release candidates for v3.3.0, v3.30.0, and v3.31.0. Key themes include UI overhauls, new persistence and scheduler modules, AI integration improvements, and workflow engine reliability enhancements.

chunks.title: v3.22.2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: conductor-oss/conductor
Release: v3.22.2
Tag: v3.22.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-10T16:09:57Z; created_at: 2026-03-10T16:09:31Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Relax task definition requirement for SIMPLE tasks by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/848
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/compare/v3.22.1...v3.22.2
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor release v3.22.2, the project relaxed task definition requirements for SIMPLE tasks.

chunks.title: v3.22.3
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: conductor-oss/conductor
Release: v3.22.3
Tag: v3.22.3; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-18T16:53:06Z; created_at: 2026-03-18T07:21:06Z
Release notes:
## What’s Changed
* Support reasonForIncompletion in fail_task event handlers (#879) @uri-simspace
* Overhaul documentation site with modern design (#863) @v1r3n
* Fix ui-next enum export (#862) @ajlai-orkes
* Port improved decider postpone logic to new sweeper (#730) @rajeshwar-nu
* Fix JetStream stream name generation for dot-separated subjects (#716) @fmelosilva
* Bump immutable from 4.1.0 to 4.3.8 in /ui (#828) @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot)
* build(deps): bump httpclient5 from 5.2.1 to 5.3.1 (#857) @nthmost-orkes
* build(deps): bump opensearch client 3.0.0 → 3.5.0 in os-persistence-v3 (#856) @nthmost-orkes
* OSS Conductor UI V2 (#852) @ajlai-orkes
* Bump com.google.guava:guava from 31.1-jre to 33.5.0-jre (#813) @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot)
* Add synchronous join support to FORK_JOIN (#619) (#680) @nthmost-orkes
* fix: stop PostgresPollDataDAO flush executor on context shutdown (#853) @nthmost-orkes
## What's Changed
* fix: stop PostgresPollDataDAO flush executor on context shutdown by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/853
* build(deps): bump docker/login-action from 3 to 4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/836
* Add synchronous join support to FORK_JOIN (#619) by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/680
* build(deps): bump docker/build-push-action from 3 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/838
* Bump com.google.guava:guava from 31.1-jre to 33.5.0-jre by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/813
* OSS Conductor UI V2 by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/852
* build(deps): bump docker/setup-buildx-action from 3 to 4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/837
* Bump docker/setup-qemu-action from 2 to 3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/814
* build(deps): bump opensearch client 3.0.0 → 3.5.0 in os-persistence-v3 by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/856
* build(deps): bump httpclient5 from 5.2.1 to 5.3.1 by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/857
* Bump immutable from 4.1.0 to 4.3.8 in /ui by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/828
* Fix JetStream stream name generation for dot-separated subjects by @fmelosilva in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/716
* Port improved decider postpone logic to new sweeper by @rajeshwar-nu in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/730
* Fix ui-next enum export by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/862
* Overhaul documentation site with modern design by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/863
* Support reasonForIncompletion in fail_task event handlers by @uri-simspace in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/879
## New Contributors
* @ajlai-orkes made their first contribution in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/852
* @fmelosilva made their first contribution in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/716
* @uri-simspace made their first contribution in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/879
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/compare/v3.22.2...v3.22.3
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor release v3.22.3, the project added support for reasonForIncompletion in fail_task event handlers, overhauled the documentation site with a modern design, fixed ui-next enum export, ported improved decider postpone logic to the new sweeper, fixed JetStream stream name generation for dot-separated subjects, bumped several dependencies, introduced OSS Conductor UI V2, added synchronous join support to FORK_JOIN, and fixed a PostgresPollDataDAO flush executor shutdown issue.

chunks.title: v3.23.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: conductor-oss/conductor
Release: v3.23.0
Tag: v3.23.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-26T18:25:28Z; created_at: 2026-03-26T18:24:07Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Feature: Add support for ES8 Persistence by @rajeshwar-nu in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/739
* Jdbc workers by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/878
* build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/874
* build(deps): bump actions/setup-node from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/868
* build(deps): bump release-drafter/release-drafter from 6 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/870
* feat: add conductor-scheduler-postgres-persistence module by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/885
* Fix Swagger UI fallback to Petstore when /api-docs/swagger-config is intercepted by @uri-simspace in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/884
* Assistant UX height adjustments by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/897
* Allow sidebar items override by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/898
* - Add pre-commit hooks by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/901
* Fix sidebar buttons so that buttons that are supposed to open in a new tab do so properly by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/916
* feat: Support multiple WF status listeners via composite pattern by @akhilpathivada in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/740
* feat: split Integrations sidebar into Connections & Resources and Connected Apps views by @najeebkp in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/918
* feat:support multi cron in scheduler by @najeebkp in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/914
* feat:add boundary timer config for tasks in wf definition by @najeebkp in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/908
* feat: add drill-down modal to Tags Dashboard by @najeebkp in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/923
* Feat/gemini api key support by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/919
* fix: DO_WHILE with empty items list completes immediately without executing loop tasks by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/887
* feat: Add TaskDef-level control for task status event publishing by @akhilpathivada in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/756
* Revert "feat: add drill-down modal to Tags Dashboard (#923)" by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/925
* Revert "feat:support multi cron in scheduler (#914)" by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/926
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/compare/v3.22.3...v3.23.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor release v3.23.0, the project added support for ES8 Persistence, introduced JDBC workers, added a conductor-scheduler-postgres-persistence module, fixed Swagger UI fallback to Petstore, made Assistant UX height adjustments, allowed sidebar items override, added pre-commit hooks, fixed sidebar buttons to open in new tabs, supported multiple WF status listeners via composite pattern, split Integrations sidebar into Connections & Resources and Connected Apps views, added multi cron support in scheduler, added boundary timer config for tasks in workflow definitions, added a drill-down modal to Tags Dashboard, added Gemini API key support, fixed DO_WHILE with empty items list, added TaskDef-level control for task status event publishing, and reverted the drill-down modal and multi cron features.

chunks.title: v3.3.0.rc5

Repository: conductor-oss/conductor
Release: v3.3.0.rc5
Tag: v3.3.0.rc5; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-02T05:52:39Z; created_at: 2026-04-02T05:52:17Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Fix the link to Getting Started in the README.md by @NicholasDCole in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/945
* feat: extract conductor-redis-api — move JedisCommands and UnifiedJedisCommands to a standalone module by @mp-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/948
* chore: remove accidentally committed TaskType.class file by @mp-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/947
* fix(persistence): strip single quotes from search query values by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/950
## New Contributors

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/compare/v3.3.0.rc4...v3.3.0.rc5
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor pre-release v3.3.0.rc5, the project fixed a link to Getting Started in the README, extracted conductor-redis-api by moving JedisCommands and UnifiedJedisCommands to a standalone module, removed an accidentally committed TaskType.class file, and stripped single quotes from search query values in persistence.

chunks.title: v3.3.0.rc6

Release: v3.3.0.rc6

Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Push up 60 second code example for the Java SDK -- Also downgrade Protobuff, upgrade Polyglot, downgrade testcontainers by @NicholasDCole in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/949
* fix: remove Python-specific example from bug report template by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/956
* fix: use correct JS SDK package in quickstart worker example by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/975

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/compare/v3.3.0.rc5...v3.3.0.rc6
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor pre-release v3.3.0.rc6, the project pushed a 60-second code example for the Java SDK while downgrading Protobuf, upgrading Polyglot, and downgrading testcontainers; removed a Python-specific example from the bug report template; fixed the JS SDK package in a quickstart worker example; and fixed a mutable map issue for tool call args in LLMHelper.

chunks.title: v3.30.0.rc1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: conductor-oss/conductor
Release: v3.30.0.rc1
Tag: v3.30.0.rc1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-13T06:15:34Z; created_at: 2026-04-12T19:41:26Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* fix: onboarding quickstart accuracy improvements by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/930
* docs: fix busy-wait loop in quickstart Python worker by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/981
* Fixes failing test harness by @rajeshwar-nu in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/984
* Restore Redis Sentinel auth and support multiple sentinel addresses in redis-lock by @rajeshwar-nu in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/951
* feat: wildcard search and sub-workflow filtering by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/996
* feat: add useSSL and trustCert fields to GrpcServiceDefDto by @shaileshpadave in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/999
* fix: conductor_server.sh — download JAR to ~/.conductor-cli/, show progress by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/990
* fix: replace broken jq pipeline with plain async start for WORKFLOW_ID capture by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1003
* fix(redis): load Redis connection beans when Redis is used for queues by @bulgarian-beast in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/992
* Fix standalone and sentinel Redis command retries by @uri-simspace in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/997
* Use mcp-core instead of mcp and remove dead MCP client code by @sergio-u-simspace in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/998
* UI reorganization by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1002
* feat: add missing integration icons by @najeebkp in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/993
* docs: remove Adoptium link from README prerequisites by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/986
## New Contributors
* @bulgarian-beast made their first contribution in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/992
* @sergio-u-simspace made their first contribution in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/998
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/compare/v3.3.0.rc8...v3.30.0.rc1
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor pre-release v3.30.0.rc1, the project improved onboarding quickstart accuracy, fixed a busy-wait loop in a quickstart Python worker, fixed a failing test harness, restored Redis Sentinel auth and supported multiple sentinel addresses in redis-lock, added wildcard search and sub-workflow filtering, added useSSL and trustCert fields to GrpcServiceDefDto, fixed conductor_server.sh to download JAR to ~/.conductor-cli/ with progress, replaced a broken jq pipeline with plain async start for WORKFLOW_ID capture, loaded Redis connection beans when Redis is used for queues, fixed standalone and sentinel Redis command retries, used mcp-core instead of mcp and removed dead MCP client code, reorganized the UI, added missing integration icons, and removed an Adoptium link from README prerequisites.

chunks.title: v3.30.0.rc2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: conductor-oss/conductor
Release: v3.30.0.rc2
Tag: v3.30.0.rc2; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-17T19:22:02Z; created_at: 2026-04-17T18:06:51Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* fix: remove GitHub account from CLAUDE.md by @mp-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1016
* fix: slow GET /metadata/workflow — Redis cache + UI switch to names-and-versions (#844) by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/974
* chore: remove tags dashboard (enterprise-only feature) by @najeebkp in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/941
* feat: add CONNECTED_APPS_ENABLED flag and integration icon type map by @najeebkp in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/935
* Clean up during CI by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1023
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/compare/v3.30.0.rc1...v3.30.0.rc2
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor pre-release v3.30.0.rc2, the project removed a GitHub account from CLAUDE.md, fixed slow GET /metadata/workflow with Redis cache and UI switch to names-and-versions, removed the tags dashboard (enterprise-only feature), added a CONNECTED_APPS_ENABLED flag and integration icon type map, and cleaned up during CI.

chunks.title: v3.30.0.rc4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: conductor-oss/conductor
Release: v3.30.0.rc4
Tag: v3.30.0.rc4; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-27T21:33:20Z; created_at: 2026-04-27T18:35:48Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Fix flaky tests on test-harness by @kowser-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1040
* fix: DO_WHILE + SWITCH premature iteration advancement when async task completes before successor is scheduled by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1001
* Remove Spring AI provider SDKs and add native tools by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1046
* revert: remove boundary timer fields from task input parameters by @najeebkp in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1044
* docs: add monitoring and callback patterns for Human tasks by @meichuanyi in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1037
## New Contributors
* @kowser-orkes made their first contribution in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1040
* @meichuanyi made their first contribution in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1037
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/compare/v3.30.0.rc3...v3.30.0.rc4
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor pre-release v3.30.0.rc4, the project fixed flaky tests on test-harness, fixed a DO_WHILE + SWITCH premature iteration advancement when an async task completes before the successor is scheduled, removed Spring AI provider SDKs and added native tools, reverted boundary timer fields from task input parameters, and added documentation for monitoring and callback patterns for Human tasks.

chunks.title: v3.30.0.rc5
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: conductor-oss/conductor
Release: v3.30.0.rc5
Tag: v3.30.0.rc5; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-28T19:03:10Z; created_at: 2026-04-28T17:56:45Z

## What's Changed
* feat(file-storage) Initial implementation for file storage feature by @kowser-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1022
* fix(ci): correct ElementTree truthiness bug in e2e summary script by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1050
* Update to jdbc workers by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1049
* docs: fix jq pipeline in quickstart (field name + drop broken tail -1) by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/988
* Package updates by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1033

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor pre-release v3.30.0.rc5, the project implemented an initial file storage feature, fixed an ElementTree truthiness bug in the e2e summary script, updated JDBC workers, fixed a jq pipeline in quickstart, and performed package updates.

chunks.title: v3.30.0.rc7
chunks.raw_text:

chunks.title: v3.30.0.rc16
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: conductor-oss/conductor
Release: v3.30.0.rc16
Tag: v3.30.0.rc16; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-18T21:59:10Z; created_at: 2026-05-18T18:09:03Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* CDX-580 AI Prompts - add json response option and include saving of temperature, topP, stopwords by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1089
* Feature/assistant improvements by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1080
* fix(amqp): skip ack when using exchange as ack is only meaningful for queues by @sergio-u-simspace in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1069
* Improve SUB_WORKFLOW reliability, recovery, and scalability by @rajeshwar-nu in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/973
* Make PostgresLockDAO reentrant by @mp-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1088
* fix(ui): crash on New Workflow Definition (null key in useFetch) by @mp-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1101
* fix: make SubWorkflow id derivation task-intrinsic so idempotency catches the race by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1099
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/compare/v3.30.0.rc15...v3.30.0.rc16
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor pre-release v3.30.0.rc16, the project added a JSON response option and saving of temperature, topP, stopwords to AI Prompts, made assistant improvements, fixed AMQP to skip ack when using exchange, improved SUB_WORKFLOW reliability, recovery, and scalability, made PostgresLockDAO reentrant, fixed a UI crash on New Workflow Definition, and made SubWorkflow id derivation task-intrinsic for idempotency.

* perf(inline): cut Inline task latency via Context pool, shared Engine, Source cache, native deep-copy by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1100
* Convert original ui tests to playwright by @ajlai-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1102
* perf(ai): unified OkHttp3 transport with shared bean, retry, and Gemini REST migration by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1112
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/compare/v3.30.0.rc16...v3.30.0.rc17
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor pre-release v3.30.0.rc17, the project cut Inline task latency via Context pool, shared Engine, Source cache, and native deep-copy; converted original UI tests to Playwright; and unified OkHttp3 transport with shared bean, retry, and Gemini REST migration for AI.

chunks.title: v3.30.0.rc18
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: conductor-oss/conductor
Release: v3.30.0.rc18
Tag: v3.30.0.rc18; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-21T18:10:12Z; created_at: 2026-05-21T18:03:21Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* refactor:rename TaskType.MCP to INTEGRATION; clean -mcp suffix from integration types by @najeebkp in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1114
* fix(ai): gate loop assistant-prefill injection on provider capability by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1115
* fix(redis): release postponed task when concurrencyLimit slot frees by @manan164 in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1105
* refactor(metrics): make Monitors self-contained; MetricsCollector becomes a registry wiring bean by @shaileshpadave in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/1059
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/compare/v3.30.0.rc17...v3.30.0.rc18
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor pre-release v3.30.0.rc18, the project renamed TaskType.MCP to INTEGRATION and cleaned -mcp suffix from integration types, gated loop assistant-prefill injection on provider capability, released postponed tasks when concurrencyLimit slot frees in Redis, and refactored metrics to make Monitors self-contained with MetricsCollector as a registry wiring bean.

chunks.title: v3.30.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: conductor-oss/conductor
Release: v3.30.0
Tag: v3.30.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-21T21:14:26Z; created_at: 2026-05-21T18:03:21Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* e2e test suite by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/900
* Fix ES8 ILM rollover template aliases by @rajeshwar-nu in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/936
* Refactor redis and upgrade jedis by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/927
* fix(ai): resolve Claude assistant message prefill error by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/943
* Fix the link to Getting Started in the README.md by @NicholasDCole in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/945
* feat: extract conductor-redis-api — move JedisCommands and UnifiedJedisCommands to a standalone module by @mp-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/948
* chore: remove accidentally committed TaskType.class file by @mp-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/947
* fix(persistence): strip single quotes from search query values by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/950
* build(deps): bump node-forge from 1.3.2 to 1.4.0 in /ui by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/932
* build(deps): bump lodash-es from 4.17.21 to 4.18.1 in /ui by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/952
* build(deps): bump path-to-regexp from 8.3.0 to 8.4.0 in /ui-next by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/940
* build(deps): bump com.h2database:h2 from 2.2.224 to 2.4.240 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/913
* build(deps): bump com.google.protobuf:protoc from 3.25.5 to 4.34.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/912
* build(deps): bump pnpm/action-setup from 4 to 5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/910
* build(deps): bump actions/cache from 4 to 5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/841
* build(deps): bump lodash from 4.17.21 to 4.18.1 in /ui by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/953
* build(deps): bump org.graalvm.sdk:graal-sdk from 24.1.0 to 25.0.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/816
* build(deps): bump org.graalvm.js:js-scriptengine from 24.1.0 to 25.0.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/909
* build(deps): bump org.opensearch:opensearch-testcontainers from 2.1.2 to 4.1.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/911
* Revert "build(deps): bump com.google.protobuf:protoc from 3.25.5 to 4.34.1" by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/962
* Push up 60 second code example for the Java SDK -- Also downgrade Protobuff, upgrade Polyglot, downgrade testcontainers by @NicholasDCole in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/949
* build: add dependency pinning system (#964) by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/965
* fix: remove Python-specific example from bug report template by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/956
* fix: use correct JS SDK package in quickstart worker example by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/975
* fix: use mutable map for tool call args in LLMHelper by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/976
* /api/version endpoint to return actual version from manifest by @v1r3n in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/977
* feat: Workflow Message Queue (WMQ) — push messages into running workflows by @mp-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/982
* fix: onboarding quickstart accuracy improvements by @nthmost-orkes in https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor/pull/930
* docs: fix busy-wait loop in quickstart Python worker...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor release v3.30.0, the project aggregated changes from multiple pre-releases including an e2e test suite, ES8 ILM rollover template alias fix, Redis refactor and Jedis upgrade, Claude assistant message prefill fix, README link fix, extraction of conductor-redis-api, removal of accidentally committed TaskType.class file, persistence search query single-quote stripping, various dependency bumps, a 60-second Java SDK code example with Protobuf downgrade, removal of Python-specific bug report template example, JS SDK package fix in quickstart, mutable map fix for LLMHelper tool call args, /api/version endpoint, Workflow Message Queue (WMQ) feature, onboarding quickstart accuracy improvements, busy-wait loop fix in quickstart Python worker, test harness fix, Redis Sentinel auth restore and multiple sentinel address support, wildcard search and sub-workflow filtering, useSSL and trustCert fields in GrpcServiceDefDto, conductor_server.sh download fix, broken jq pipeline replacement, Redis connection bean loading for queues, standalone and sentinel Redis command retry fix, mcp-core usage and dead MCP client code removal, UI reorganization, missing integration icons addition, and Adoptium link removal from README prerequisites.

questions.query_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor releases, which release introduces the Workflow Message Queue (WMQ) feature to push messages into running workflows?

answer_support.answer_text: introduced the Workflow Message Queue (WMQ) feature to push messages into running workflows

questions.query_text: Across the conductor-oss/conductor releases, how does the AI-related change in v3.30.1 differ from the AI-related change in v3.30.0.rc14?

options.text: v3.30.1 rewrites thinkingTokenLimit to adaptive thinking on Claude Opus 4.7, while v3.30.0.rc14 adds reasoning / chain-of-thought summary support across all AI providers.
v3.30.1 adds reasoning / chain-of-thought summary support, while v3.30.0.rc14 rewrites thinkingTokenLimit.
Both releases only update AI provider SDKs without functional changes.
v3.30.1 removes AI features, while v3.30.0.rc14 adds them.

questions.expected_answer: v3.30.1 rewrites thinkingTokenLimit to adaptive thinking on Claude Opus 4.7, while v3.30.0.rc14 adds reasoning / chain-of-thought summary support across all AI providers.

answer_support.answer_text: rewrote thinkingTokenLimit to adaptive thinking on Claude Opus 4.7
added reasoning / chain-of-thought summary support across all AI providers

questions.query_text: In the conductor-oss/conductor release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds synchronous join support to FORK_JOIN, (2) a release that introduces JDBC workers, (3) a release that adds a /api/version endpoint returning the actual version from the manifest, (4) a release that adds reasoning / chain-of-thought summary support across all AI providers.

answer_support.answer_text: added synchronous join support to FORK_JOIN
added a /api/version endpoint that returns the actual version from the manifest
added reasoning / chain-of-thought summary support across all AI providers
